programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: JJ reluctantly lets Tina take over her assistant duties for the day, but a Tina slip-up leads to an outbreak of town adults drinking diluted special formula that makes them all baby-brained. programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Crispin Biscuits frames Boss and Tina’s startup company for exploding baby Iggy’s favorite stuffed animal, and Tina is forced to the sidelines to avoid any more bad press. As Crispin expands his plan to burst all the plush toys in the neighborhood, Tina discovers she can stop this by breaking open and rewiring a single toy doll. Unfortunately that doll is Baby Corp’s current head honcho, Pull-String CEO Baby.

programme.title: Voltron: Legendary Defender
programme.desc: The team sets off to rescue the people of the dying lava planet of Tajueer

programme.title: Voltron: Legendary Defender
programme.desc: Team Voltron travels to an intergalactic mall to purchase lenses needed to power the TeleDav

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: After Aunt Cora moves out, Lucky tries to live a life without rules.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was time when Vulture was not bald. Oh no, Vulture's head was covered in a beautiful crown of golden plumage! Vain Vulture never shut up about her golden feathers and was obsessed about making them ‘as golden as the sun!'. One day Vulture decides to fly up to the sun, but her precious feathers get burnt! Vulture decides to sooth her smoking feathers with golden honey which she steals from the bees. The bees are not pleased and Vulture sticks her head down Aardvark's burrow. However, Aardvark loves feathers all covered in honey and when Vulture surfaces she is as bald as… well, as a Vulture! Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Giraffe didn't have a long neck. Her neck was all short and stumpy and she was a very delicate eater. All the food in Tinga Tinga seemed to make her tummy go funny. Then one day Lion suggests she try some honey. With the Bees permission, Giraffe tries to lick the honey… but it is deep, deep inside the tree. Giraffe squeezes her head into the honey tree and then EEEeeek! Her head gets stuck! Summer, Autumn, Winter pass by with Giraffe's head stuck inside the tree, but she is quite happy because the honey is so delicious. The tree grows and Giraffe's neck gets longer and longer! After a whole year ‘POP!' she manages to pull herself free and from that day on Giraffe has a very long neck and can eat the freshest leaves on the very tops of the trees! Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Big Chris has got a new gadget to monitor the cars. He puts it to the test, what could possibly go wrong?!

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: George and Harold decide to do an extra credit project on dinosaurs to help their chances of getting summer camp-worthy grades. programme.title: Regular Show
programme.desc: Mordecai buys a new cologne to attract Margaret instead of hanging out with Rigby like he promised.

programme.title: Ben 10
programme.desc: When the Rust Bucket runs out of gas on a foggy, East Coast road, Ben, Gwen and Max are forced to stay at a hotel being menaced by Creepy Carl - a local folklore expert, who may actually be a ghost!

programme.title: Courage The Cowardly Dog
programme.desc: A famous film director (actually a zombie) comes to the farm wanting to shoot his next film. Eustace accepts greedily when he is promised money, only to find that the film is just a pretext for the director and his zombie partner to devour Muriel.

programme.title: Regular Show
programme.desc: Mordecai and Rigby try to seize an opportunity to eat a piece of cake, and it comes when they learn that Skips' birthday is coming soon.

programme.title: Ben 10
programme.desc: Team Tennyson looks to take in the sights of the Shoshone Falls, but when they arrive to find Steam Smythe siphoning off the water, it is up to Ben, Grandpa Max and Gwen to shut down the hydropower plant and save the Falls.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: In order to get his powers back, Beast Boy returns to nature and finds it much harsher than he expects.

programme.title: Super Shiro
programme.desc: With the ordinary Nohara family, lives an ordinary dog, whose name is very ordinary, Shiro. The one thing that isn't ordinary? He's a superhero!

programme.title: Grizzy And The Lemmings
programme.desc: When Grizzy propels the Lemmings out of the log cabin perched on the Great Wall of China, the critters land on a small traditional house in a bamboo forest.

programme.title: The Tom And Jerry Show
programme.desc: Quacker enlists Jerry's help to fix his favorite birdbath that has cracked, but the two get sidetracked by the scent of Tom's delicious Chinese takeout.

programme.title: Lamput
programme.desc: In an accident with the Shrink Gun, a potted plant grows into a giant beanstalk and takes Lamput and the Docs up with it! It's a world inhabited by a giant and Skinny gets trapped!

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr Bean buys a chicken but has to hide it from his allergic landlady!

programme.title: Tom And Jerry Gokko
programme.desc: Tom and Jerry are collecting Easter eggs, Quacker hatches from one of the eggs and runs away from Tom. Jerry helps Quacker escape. Tom falls into the pond, Quacker and Jerry save Tom. They all share Easter basket treats in the end.

programme.title: Tom And Jerry Gokko
programme.desc: On a picnic, Tom battles Jerry and Tuffy over the food. A falling beehive turns the chase into chaos, leaving Tuffy behind - stuffed with apples and hilariously apple-shaped.

programme.title: Looney Tunes Cartoons
programme.desc: Elmer throws a birthday party. Porky goes old school. Marvin the Martian tries to give his dog a bath.

programme.title: Tiny Toons Looniversity
programme.desc: Babs is drawn into the world of modeling by animal calendar photographer, Elmyra Duff, while Plucky grapples with a bad caricature.

programme.title: Tiny Toons Looniversity
programme.desc: It's picture day at Acme Loo! Babs accidentally shrinks herself, Buster fails to get the perfect photo day haircut, Plucky gives lessons on being direct, and Hamton struggles to find his photo persona.

programme.title: Ninjago: Dragons Rising
programme.desc: The Ninja hurry to the First Land to stop the Forbidden Five from freeing ThunderFang, and Wyldfyre discovers a drastic cure to Roby's decay.

programme.title: The Amazing World Of Gumball
programme.desc: Gumball finds Penny's laugh annoying, but can't think of a way to tell her without offending her. When he discovers that Principal Brown has the same problem with Miss Simian's morning breath, they decide to swap problems to save themselves from getting dumped.

programme.title: Regular Show
programme.desc: Enraged at Mordecai and Rigby's constant slacking, Benson orders the "Peeps" surveillance system to force them into working.

programme.title: Tom And Jerry Gokko
programme.desc: Tom and Jerry are collecting Easter eggs, Quacker hatches from one of the eggs and runs away from Tom. Jerry helps Quacker escape. Tom falls into the pond, Quacker and Jerry save Tom. They all share Easter basket treats in the end.

programme.title: Tom And Jerry Gokko
programme.desc: On a picnic, Tom battles Jerry and Tuffy over the food. A falling beehive turns the chase into chaos, leaving Tuffy behind - stuffed with apples and hilariously apple-shaped.

programme.title: Looney Tunes Cartoons
programme.desc: It's love, Looney Tunes style!

programme.title: Tiny Toons Looniversity: Spring Beak
programme.desc: Plucky goes home with Babs and Buster for Spring Break and quickly becomes the new star of Burrowville, while Hamton and Sweetie embark on the adventure after accidently missing their train stop.

programme.title: Tiny Toons Looniversity
programme.desc: Sweetie competes in a cat vs. bird competition but faces pressure to win at all costs. Hamton and Babs go into soccer mom-mode cheering her on, while Plucky, at the Loo Bru, takes over Dizzy’s shift to prove he’s more selfless than Buster.

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr Bean pretends Teddy is a baby to get a family parking space, but gets him mixed up with a real baby in the supermarket!

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: When a vendor at the Farmers' Market (Lucy) sticks Panda with an EpiPen, reviving him after an allergic reaction, Panda comes to in the arms of his dream girl. Panda tries to woo this woman of his dreams, but his brothers and his own insecurities get in the way.

programme.title: Grizzy And The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy pinches a magic statue from the Lemmings that has the power to make objects appear in real life. All you have to do, is pin the photo of one's desires upon it.

programme.title: The Amazing World Of Gumball
programme.desc: After they receive an extravagant invitation to Masami's birthday party, Gumball and Darwin are anxious to find just the right gift for her. However, they're not the only ones: it turns out every kid in Elmore is competing to get Masami the perfect present. When Gumball and Darwin decide to think outside the box, their unusual gift is a big surprise, but not a good one.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: Still shipwrecked on a desert island Robin grants the other Titans their crazy desires.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: When Aqualad and Raven fall for each other, Beast Boy fights this match - with intensity.

programme.title: Ninjago: Dragons Rising
programme.desc: The Ninja hurry to the First Land to stop the Forbidden Five from freeing ThunderFang, and Wyldfyre discovers a drastic cure to Roby's decay.

programme.title: The Powerpuff Girls
programme.desc: When Bubbles blames a string of accidents on her imaginary friend "Bliss," her sisters begin to think she's lost her mind.

programme.title: The Amazing World Of Gumball
programme.desc: Dad has to make the kids on time for their first day back at school. But he's overslept and now he can't find Gumball, Darwin or Anais anywhere. He sets about retracing his steps from the day before, to work out where they might be. When he finally figures out where they are, it's a race against time to rescue them and prove to himself - and Mum - that he's not a bad father.

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Bean wants to avoid lunch with Irma’s Mum at all costs. He persuades Mrs. Wicket to let him join her on a coach trip to a concert.

programme.title: Super Shiro
programme.desc: One of the bolts used to build a skyscraper might be the Bobobobobone. Shiro climbs the steel frames but the construction site is dangerous. Will Shiro reach the bolt?

programme.title: Exchange Student Zero
programme.desc: The exchange kids exchange back to their original worlds for some much needed father-and-son time. However distance has not made respective hearts grow fonder.

programme.desc: After Aunt Cora moves out, Lucky tries to live a life without rules.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was time when Vulture was not bald. Oh no, Vulture's head was covered in a beautiful crown of golden plumage! Vain Vulture never shut up about her golden feathers and was obsessed about making them ‘as golden as the sun!'. One day Vulture decides to fly up to the sun, but her precious feathers get burnt! Vulture decides to sooth her smoking feathers with golden honey which she steals from the bees. The bees are not pleased and Vulture sticks her head down Aardvark's burrow. However, Aardvark loves feathers all covered in honey and when Vulture surfaces she is as bald as… well, as a Vulture! Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Giraffe didn't have a long neck. Her neck was all short and stumpy and she was a very delicate eater. All the food in Tinga Tinga seemed to make her tummy go funny. Then one day Lion suggests she try some honey. With the Bees permission, Giraffe tries to lick the honey… but it is deep, deep inside the tree. Giraffe squeezes her head into the honey tree and then EEEeeek! Her head gets stuck! Summer, Autumn, Winter pass by with Giraffe's head stuck inside the tree, but she is quite happy because the honey is so delicious. The tree grows and Giraffe's neck gets longer and longer! After a whole year ‘POP!' she manages to pull herself free and from that day on Giraffe has a very long neck and can eat the freshest leaves on the very tops of the trees! Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Big Chris has got a new gadget to monitor the cars. He puts it to the test, what could possibly go wrong?!

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Big Chris is furious when Marsha tidies up his workshop - how's he supposed to work in these conditions? Luckily Flash saves helps out by messing it up again!

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Conrod is having an engine tune up at Silver Hatch. He boasts that his spoilers make him faster than all the other cars… who then want to be just as fast as their V8 hero…

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Mr Carburettor is fed up with Roary and Maxi constantly bickering about who is the fastest car at Silver Hatch. He decrees that the pair will have a race, and whoever wins, is the fastest - no more arguing!

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Roary is in a mischievous mood and keeps crashing into things. Big Chris has a great idea how Roary can burn up all his energy and be helpful at the same time!

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Farmer Green and FB are very nervous about going to Mama Mia's garden party. James and the other cars offer to teach them how to behave at such an event. But everything doesn't quite go to plan…

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Scallop is afraid of her first “tuskist” appointment. Kelp helps her get through it with a song. / Fog rolls in, threatening Kelp’s first Three Moon Festival in Unicorn Land. Kelp and his friends use a combination of unicorn spark and the Kelp Way to create a new festival.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: Magnus hatches a plan to hide in an egg to spy on the Rescue Riders. But things get all scrambled when a mama dragon takes him to her nest.

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: Ton-Ton's friends, The 'Dumps, visit the Flatirons but are too wild and crazy for the crew, so the Dinotrux build a racetrack perfect for joyriding.

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: When D-Structs tricks the Gluphosaurs into attacking the Dinotrux, Revvit must befriend them and find a way to “unstick” the crew from one another.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: JJ reluctantly lets Tina take over her assistant duties for the day, but a Tina slip-up leads to an outbreak of town adults drinking diluted special formula that makes them all baby-brained. When JJ discovers this, she works with R & D Baby Simmons and Security Baby Katja to antidote the wobbling “Adult Babies” before Tina can find out and blame herself.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Crispin Biscuits frames Boss and Tina’s startup company for exploding baby Iggy’s favorite stuffed animal, and Tina is forced to the sidelines to avoid any more bad press. As Crispin expands his plan to burst all the plush toys in the neighborhood, Tina discovers she can stop this by breaking open and rewiring a single toy doll. Unfortunately that doll is Baby Corp’s current head honcho, Pull-String CEO Baby.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: In hopes of raising their grades so they can go to Lake Summer Camp, George and Harold must teach Ratrick, their assigned rat, a simple task. But Ratrick runs away into the sewers where he is doused with toxic waste and transformed into Poopacabra! It's now up to the boys and Captain Underpants to stop the beast before it takes over Piqua with its stench, and more importantly, ruins the boys' chances to go to Lake Summer Camp.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: George and Harold decide to do an extra credit project on dinosaurs to help their chances of getting summer camp-worthy grades. When Melvin brings in a dinosaur frozen in ice, the boys try to get rid of it. But the ice thaws and they meet Diddlysaurus, a prankster raptor who's huge fans of the boys. He offers to help them with their project if he can pull pranks with them, but when the pranks go too far, the boys and Captain Underpants have to deal with the dino.

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: After getting hit on the head, Eep has a vision and sets out to get the Valley to show how thankful they are; Grug feels like he's the biggest joke in Ahhh Valley, so he asks Thunk to make a “buy-o-pic” of him to show people just how truly great he is

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: Lerk and Thunk hide all the valley's worms in a cave to protect them from the hunters who want to use them as bait; Grug invents the spear and pitches it to the Valley as a tool that will change cavemanity forever!

programme.title: Operation Bangkok
programme.desc: Military veteran Wu and undercover cop Ming rescue hostages on an island near Bangkok. Just as the mission is completed and they prepare to leave, Wu discovers his daughter has also been captured. Determined to save her, he stays with Ming to fight the thugs and rescue her.

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: Wu Lin: The Society
programme.desc: Set in 2050, where rampant pollution and viruses force people to wear masks just to breathe, yet daily life continues as usual. When a series of mysterious deaths erupts, police suspect a serial killer while rumors swirl of a demon on a rampage. Now, the police must race to unravel the mystery and stop the killings before panic consumes the city.

programme.title: Detective Dee's Seven Deadly Sin
programme.desc: Detective Dee becomes embroiled in a series of murders that shake the Tang Empire. The killer invokes the "Seven Deadly Sins" to justify a twisted sense of justice. In his relentless pursuit of the truth, Detective Dee uncovers the mask of false righteousness and exposes the darkness hidden beneath.

programme.title: Extreme Ends
programme.desc: Extreme Ends is an action-adventure reality show featuring four celebrities and their special guests experiencing the diversity of Hong Kong! Embark on the journey with two Thai artistes, Gun and Ticha, as they navigate the bustling city life and discover the serene outskirts of Hong Kong.

programme.title: The Ultimate BROcation
programme.desc: A hilarious reality show about four famous male celebrities from different countries on an all-expenses-paid fantasy vacation in Hong Kong, tailor-made for the “bros”!

programme.title: Detective Dee: The Ghosts in Weird Town
programme.desc: Detective Dee investigates a series of terrifying vampire transformations in Youming Town, uncovering a sinister conspiracy masterminded by Prince Li Zhen, who plots to overthrow the empire. Armed with courage and ingenuity, Dee defeats the bloodthirsty vampires and ultimately exposes the prince’s dark ambitions.

programme.title: Extreme Ends
programme.desc: Extreme Ends is an action-adventure reality show featuring four celebrities and their special guests experiencing the diversity of Hong Kong! Join award-winning Malaysian actress Siti Saleha and her husband as they explore the city by day and venture into the night, discovering its vibrant culture and hidden treasures.

programme.title: The Macaque Monkey
programme.desc: The world is in chaos after the tree of life was burnt. Sun Wu Kong decides to return to the past to resurrect it, but his divine power is unstable after losing the golden hoop, and he must find his younger self to team up to find the power of time. As the six-eared Macaque Monkey also wants the power of time, they clash in a fierce battle…

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: An unassuming night out with her girlfriends yields one of the most emotional and surprising readings, as Theresa delivers messages to a skeptical woman grieving the shocking loss of her pregnant daughter.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes (S2)
programme.desc: Semi-dried tomatoes are a new staple in American grocery stores. Rachael demonstrates how to use them as the star in her recipe for a pesto paired with broccolini and served with sausage.

programme.title: Legends Of The Fork
programme.desc: Buddy hits up two time-tested restaurants that have become lasting legends. First up is Triple Crown, where he'll taste the house-made dim sum that has kept customers coming back for almost thirty years!

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S2)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah prepares her Southern-style chicken confit by seasoning the chicken, adding vegetables and herbs, and slow-cooking it in oil. She finishes the dish with pickled fennel and “dirty pasta”.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Host Michael Yo goes beneath it all to find five of the most unusual dining adventures below and beyond! Dive down twenty feet under the sea for North Atlantic seafood in Norway.

programme.title: My Professor's Guide To Murder
programme.desc: When a bestselling murder-mystery writer is invited to be a guest lecturer at a prestigious university, a graduate student begins to suspect he is responsible for a grisly campus murder.

programme.title: Robin Roberts Presents I Will Survive: The Gloria Gaynor Story
programme.desc: The film chronicles Gaynor's rise to fame, from her humble beginnings to becoming one of the most iconic voices in music history. The biopic will also delve into the personal challenges Gaynor faced.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S5)
programme.desc: Without Chauncey's knowledge, Derek purchases a zombie located in an historical conservation district, hindering the way these flippers are able to renovate the house.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Host Michael Yo introduces viewers to dining destinations deemed impossible - but also delicious! First up, a trip to Thailand to sip tea in a tree before jetting off to a restaurant balanced on a rock.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: In this episode, host Michael Yo takes viewers on five mind-blowing dining adventures that push the limits of imagination and exceed all culinary expectations!

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael is joined by husband John, as she shows how to prepare a chicken and fig dish, featured on their wedding menu. Meanwhile, Rachael's sister Maria makes a one-bowl carrot cake.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael is known for her delicious and flavourful pesto sauces of all varieties. She prepares a pesto alla trapanese, a Sicilian dish made with almonds and tomatoes.

programme.title: Airline Wars
programme.desc: A cancelled flight to a dream vacation sends a mother over the edge. A pilot has no choice but to restrain an allegedly intoxicated man. Reports of gunshots at JFK causes complete pandemonium.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: Jon's huge, 25-year-old shoulder-blade bump is ruining his family beach days and risking his health. April wants the wedding of her dreams but feels hideous in gowns due to her bumpy underarm "threast".

programme.title: Robin Roberts Presents I Will Survive: The Gloria Gaynor Story
programme.desc: The film chronicles Gaynor's rise to fame, from her humble beginnings to becoming one of the most iconic voices in music history. The biopic will also delve into the personal challenges Gaynor faced.

programme.title: The Man With My Husband's Face
programme.desc: A woman's husband disappears; presumed drowned. But then, she catches a glimpse of a man who looks exactly like him, setting off a chain of events that unravels everything she thought she knew about him.

programme.title: Enlighten Your Life (S3)
programme.desc: As more people are enjoying leisure activities and hobbies at home, the trend of "home entertainment" is gaining popularity. The homes we’re featuring today are all about emphasising home entertainment!

programme.desc: From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S1)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah makes country captain chicken stew, a flavourful Southern dish with an Indian influence, made with bone-in chicken, curry, tomatoes and coconut milk, served over rice noodles.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S1)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece blends flavours from Latin and South America, adding her southern charm to create encocado shrimp with poblano-stuffed grits, also known as Latin shrimp and grits.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S1)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece prepares a pasta version of paella, a traditional Spanish dish, and gives it a Southern mac-and-cheese twist.

programme.desc: While in London, Theresa visits a hatmaker to dress for high tea, and is surprised when the hatmaker turns down a reading. At tea, Theresa conducts an emotional group reading.

programme.desc: A teenage girl goes missing when her family's car breaks down in Death Valley. Her parents will need to make unlikely allies if they are to find their daughter before she disappears forever.

programme.desc: Like everyone, comedian and actress Amy Schumer is staying at home right now. But unlike most people, she's at home with a chef: her husband, Chris Fischer.

programme.title: Amy Schumer Learns To Cook (S1)
programme.desc: Like everyone, comedian and actress Amy Schumer is staying at home right now. But unlike most people, she's at home with a chef: her husband, Chris Fischer.

programme.title: All-Star Best Thing I Ever Ate (S1)
programme.desc: Bobby Flay reveals his favorite neighborhood joint for fried chicken, Martha Stewart has a fried feast in Manhattan, and Robert Irvine eats fried rice in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Food: Fact Or Fiction (S2)
programme.desc: Michael McKean separates the good from the bad on some wicked food tales.

programme.title: Food: Fact Or Fiction (S2)
programme.desc: Learn the facts behind the baker's dozen and if you can butter someone up.

programme.title: Alex Vs America (S5)
programme.desc: All-star judges Maneet Chauhan, Scott Conant and Marcus Samuelsson try to take down Alex Guarnaschelli in a historic battle.

programme.title: Chopped (S50)
programme.desc: The competing chefs have to cook with ingredients representative of foods we might be noshing on in the future, including insects in the first round!

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's (S6)
programme.desc: Bobby Flay is putting a new spin on classic neighborhood pancake house dishes like Silver Dollar Tropical Pancakes and two versions of Hazelnut-Chocolate-Toffee Coffee.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's (S6)
programme.desc: Bobby Flay entertains with the bold and unexpected flavors of Middle Eastern cuisine.His crowd-pleasing menu includes Vanilla-Cardamom French Toast with Roasted Apples.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food (S2)
programme.desc: Roger Mooking searches for the 12 freshest and most amazing island eats in America, from lobster, conch and shellfish to low-country boils and key lime pies.

programme.title: Chef Boot Camp (S1)
programme.desc: Chef Cliff Crooks connects with a chef in Connecticut who needs to branch out from wings and burgers, a Vermont chef in need of a confidence boost .

programme.title: The Flay List (S1)
programme.desc: Bobby and Sophie Flay share their favorite steaks at Quality Eats NoMad and Wolfgang's Steakhouse.

programme.title: The Flay List (S1)
programme.desc: Bobby and Sophie Flay visit their favorite pizza places in NYC, Joe's Pizza and Emily.

programme.desc: Scott Conant and journalist Kaitlan Collins hope to report a loss by enlisting judges Hugh Mangum and Katie Pickens to take Bobby down.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay (S38)

programme.title: Alone (S12)
programme.desc: Faced with skittish game and unfamiliar plants, the final group of survivalists quickly learn their earliest strategies will be met with unforgiving resistance.

programme.title: Hazardous History With Henry Winkler (S1)
programme.desc: Buckle up as we take you on a wild journey into the world of vintage daredevils who risked it all for a rush. From the enigmatic Human Fly to skateboard speed demons, these stunts were unforgettable.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S5)
programme.desc: With 500-year-old secrets hidden in skeletons and stone, Machu Picchu is one of the most puzzling archaeological sites on earth. Who built this astonishing complex, and why?

programme.title: Dark Marvels
programme.desc: The dark origin stories behind some of history's most notorious methods of execution, from the guillotine to the electric chair.

programme.title: Pawn Stars (S24)
programme.desc: Rick aims to negotiate a football helmet signed by 28 Heisman winners. Chum travels to LA to iron out a deal for vintage garb. Will he be able to thread the needle, or will his trip be oh sew pointless?

programme.title: The Secret Of Skinwalker Ranch (S4)
programme.desc: As the team conducts their most complex experiment ever at the Triangle, they are stunned as a number of bizarre events unfold before their eyes.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd (S3)
programme.desc: These stories take survival to the extreme. Like fending off a black bear while dangling off a cliff. Or drifting through shark-infested waters with nothing but a pair of rubber boots to stay afloat.

programme.title: Alone (S12)
programme.desc: Faced with skittish game and unfamiliar plants, the final group of survivalists quickly learn their earliest strategies will be met with unforgiving resistance.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens (S16)
programme.desc: Giorgio Tsoukalos looks at mysterious teachers who have appeared throughout history and reveals The Top Ten Alien Influencers, who he believes provide the ultimate proof of extraterrestrial contact.

programme.title: The Bermuda Triangle: Into Cursed Waters (S2)
programme.desc: Did a Bermuda Triangle tsunami claim two behemoth ships, or did they fall prey to Nazi U-Boats? The team sets its sights on a famous Bermuda Triangle case: the twin vanishings of two massive cargo ships.

programme.title: Mountain Men (S13)
programme.desc: Lauro kicks Iditarod training into high gear with a 300-mile run on the Denali Highway; Bret and Ivy go from checking traps to hunting moose and take the opportunity to bring down a large bull.

programme.title: Forged In Fire (S10)
programme.desc: In a Forged in Fire twist unlike anything we've ever done before, four teams of expert builders are tasked with making some of the largest and most notorious siege weapons ever seen on the battlefield.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island (S12)
programme.desc: Optimism abounds when the Fellowship returns to Smith's Cove and finds evidence of work that could finally uncover the legendary flood tunnels and lead them directly to the Money Pit.

programme.title: The Death Coast
programme.desc: Third-generation shipwreck hunter Jeff MacKinnon searches the deadly Death Coast for Le Chameau, an 18th-century shipwreck carrying a fortune in rare coins.

programme.title: Lingerie
programme.desc: Don’t miss the latest trends in the most sensual pieces of fashion, we’re talking about the latest lingerie collections presented on the world podiums! Sizzling hot looks from top lingerie designers

programme.title: Song of the Assassins
programme.desc: A young assassin is assigned his first mission while secretly investigating the cause of his family’s massacre years ago. While taking on the mission, he finds himself entangled in a political conspiracy that was planned for years and has to use his skills as an assassin to solve whatever comes his way.

programme.title: The Magic Blade
programme.desc: The movie depicts Fu Hong Xue fighting against the formidable conspirator Master Yu and seeing through his deception. The brilliantly choreographed fights, glorious settings, superb cinematography and strong casts define this movie as a highpoint in Wu Xia cinema.

programme.title: Bloody Parrot
programme.desc: A swordsman is suspected of being the thief of a treasure sent to Emperor. Through his investigation, he is led on to the trail of the supernatural “Bloody Parrot”. Poisonous things happen including a demonic possession, witches casting poison spells and disgusting autopsies. Then a dead constable turns into a vampire!

programme.title: The Twelve Gold Medallions
programme.desc: This was one of top three films of 1970 and winner of "Outstanding Drama" at the 9th Golden Horse Awards. The evil minister uses twelve golden medallions to summon war hero Yueh Fei back from the frontline and execute him. A group of wandering warriors, led by Yueh Hua and Chin Ping, try to stop the medallion couriers.

programme.title: Jealousy
programme.desc: Model Min is admitted to a hospital, but mysteriously falls to her death at night. Rumour has it that the hospital is haunted. Subsequently, Min's photographer begins receiving eerie phone calls, the writer loses consciousness in a bizarre car accident, and her friend mysteriously disappears…

programme.title: The Treasure Hunters
programme.desc: Fans of the international star Alexander Fu Sheng were aghast. Their idol had broken both his legs and was recuperating. Everyone wondered: would he be able to return to the action comedies for which he was so famous? This movie was the answer, and it left no doubt that he had made a full recovery. Liu Chia-yung, brother of preeminent martial arts moviemaker Liu Chia-liang, was famous in his own right for kung-fu comedies, and he out-did himself with this one. Imagine Bob Hope and Bing Crosby with the skills of Jet Li and Jackie Chan, and you’ve got an idea of the fun and fury inherent in this delightful tale of two con men vying for a horde of hidden gold. Add to the mix a Shaolin monk (played by "Master Killer" Gordon Liu Chia-hui), a powerfully brutal villain, and his equally dangerous mute sister (future director Yang Tsing-tsing), and you’ve got one of the most internationally loved kung-fu capers ever made.

programme.title: Rivals of Kung Fu
programme.desc: As Shen and Wong Fei Hung’s relationship turns sour, Shen frames Wong and his disciple for murder. They are saved by a businessman Zhou, but Wong must win the Lion Dance Trophy to return Zhou’s favour. Can Wong Fei Hung defeat all skilled martial artists and complete his mission?

programme.title: Blind War
programme.desc: Former SWAT captain Dong Gu suffers traumatic visual loss during a failed mission for which he is forced to take responsibility. He manages to get over and adapt to the situation with his daughter’s company, until his nemesis appears and puts his daughter in danger. Despite being blind, Dong Gu must fight to save his daughter.

programme.title: One More Chance
programme.desc: Chow Yun Fat stars as a down-on-his-luck gambler, Water, whose ex-girlfriend asked him to take care of their autistic son. As Water lives with his son, he soon finds his goal in life. When he discovers his son’s talent in running, Water decides to give up his dissipated life and support his son to achieve his dream.

programme.title: Peg O' My Heart
programme.desc: Psychiatrist Dr. Man begins treating night-shift taxi driver Choi, who is afraid to sleep and can no longer distinguish dreams from reality. During therapy, Dr. Man becomes haunted by his own disturbing and perplexing dreams. Are these night terrors the result of repressed memories, or the price of uncovering the ghosts hidden in Choi’s past?

programme.title: 3AM - The Driver
programme.desc: A taxi driver who is constantly judging others by his own standards, also reads into their every move and sets out to help ‘victims’ in his own way. When a woman he likes seems to be bullied by her son, he goes about setting things right for her, even resorting to turning himself into a cold-blooded serial killer…

programme.title: Fierce Cop
programme.desc: To save his son who has been kidnapped by human traffickers, police officer Zhang relentlessly hunts them down and accidentally finds himself implicated in a major child abduction case. In the process, he teams up with a mysterious lady to crack the international crime syndicate and rescue his son.

programme.title: Endgame
programme.desc: A killer and a stage actor accidentally swapped their identities at a bathhouse. The actor must complete the killer’s mission while the killer thinks he is a hopeless actor after losing his memory during the accident. When the killer strives to become a successful stage actor, he also starts to recall what has happened…

programme.title: Love in a Fallen City
programme.desc: Based on a novel of the same name by the famous novelist Eileen Chang and directed by the equally acclaimed director Ann Hui, this romance story depicts the challenging relationship between an introverted Shanghai divorcee and a cynical Malaysian playboy during the Japanese invasion of Hong Kong in the 1940s. Will the lovers be together in the end?

programme.title: Bursting Point
programme.desc: Senior Inspector Bang sends Officer Ming undercover to a drug cartel to displace drug lord Yang. A failed raid triggers Yang's rage for revenge. Meanwhile, drug maker Ying Xiu is forced to cooperate with the police and sets a trap for Yang. The battle between the police and the drug cartel has just begun!

programme.title: Babaeng Hinugot Sa Aking Tadyang
programme.desc: Homer (Eddie Rodriguez) is an avowed bachelor but meeting Proserfina (Vivian Velez) changes him. The intriguing lass comes and goes from his house, not committing to any kind of relationship. What is Proserfina's secret?

programme.title: Kosa
programme.desc: Two convicts develop a close friendship because of their common goal which was to exact revenge for their loved ones. Their obssession of getting back at their enemies drove them to escape and to alienate all the people around them including their fellow inmates.

programme.title: Isla Paraiso
programme.desc: A series of inexplicable and mind-boggling twists of incidents inside the hacienda take place as the animosity between two sisters heightens.

programme.title: Simaron
programme.desc: As a martial arts expert, a graduate of the Police Academy of America and the son of a retired general, Cris could have had all the privileges possible for a career in the armed forces. However, like many of the heroes he had idolized since childhood, he chosed to go undercover.

programme.title: Kahit Ako'y Busabos
programme.desc: Guiller (Ace Vergel), a young man who grew up in the slums of Tondo as a street toughie. In truth though, he was a kind-hearted man, who was forced to hide the good in him in order to survive in the cruel environment he grew up in.

programme.title: Wala Nang Iibigin Pang Iba
programme.desc: Sharon Cuneta and Cesar Montano teamed up in a wacky adventure that took them around rarely seen picturesque spots in the island of Luzon. Their escape led to a long, arduous and very funny chase, where they fought the bad guys and fell deeply in love.

programme.title: A E I O U
programme.desc: Five misbegotten but witty kids survived this cold-hearted community.They found their hero in the person of Captain Juan,a funny but dedicated cop.

programme.title: Kalabog En Bosyo

programme.desc: Dora and Boots help Grumpy Old Troll untwist his tongue with Quickatoo's help. // Dora and Boots help Chompy find another Cloud Flower Seed after he accidentally eats Isa's.

programme.desc: The Barbabies win a touchpad. They all want to use it and snaffle it one after another. // Barbazoo collects photos of moustached celebrities. Unfortunately, it's impossible to find the last one: Charles Horseshoe-Furlip. He suspects a conspiracy...

programme.title: Barbapapa - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: Barbabeau forgot to return his book to the library. As Mr Strict the librarian is visiting Barbapapa today, Barbabeau decides to run away. // Barbamama wants the barbababies to tidy their bedrooms. They're hiding to escape the drudgery.

programme.title: Barbapapa - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: On a ski trip, the Barbapapas build a giant igloo. Barbabravo and Barbalib challenge each other to find out who is braver. // Barbabright creates a vacuuming robot that's also very good at soccer. The Barbababies organise a match against the robots.

programme.title: Barbapapa - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: Barbabright coats the house in magic product to prevent water leakage. The next day, The house deflates like a balloon. // A bird builds its nest on Barbazoo's belly. Barbazoo wants to become a big tree to shelter animals. This becomes complicated.

programme.title: Barbapapa - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: The barbababies discover a strange cave. Barbalib tells the story of the caves Barbapapa and how they transformed. // The Barbababies have a sleepover in the living room. Fearing the monsters in the closet, they set up wacky traps to catch them.

programme.desc: Alex dreams that his Mini Patrol animals can talk as they take the Bookmobile on a wild adventure! // Mayor Humdinger steals "The History of Adventure Bay," the book falls apart, and It's up to the Paw Patrol to retrieve it.

programme.desc: Digi and Tal's inventions to help a busy Mayor Goodway go haywire. // Mayor Humdinger squeezes himself into the Trekkers' dune buggy race, while his cheating ways put the other racers in jeopardy.

programme.title: War Dogs
programme.desc: The Wolf of Wall Street's Jonah Hill and Whiplash's Miles Teller star in this dramedy based on a true story that follows two twenty-something Miami stoners who exploit a little-known government initiative during the Iraq War that allows small businesses to bid on U.S. Military contracts. Starting small, they begin raking in big money and are soon living the high life. But the pair gets in over their heads when they land a $300 million deal to arm the Afghan Military -- a deal that puts them in business with some very shady people, not the least of which turns out to be the U.S. Government. Comedy powerhouse Todd Phillips (The Hangover films) writes, directs and produces (with Bradley Cooper) this incredible true story based on a controversial Rolling Stone article.

programme.title: ER S1 15
programme.desc: Morgenstern offers Greene a position as attending physician after completion of his residency. New crash carts are stolen by cardiology. Deb outshines Carter in front of Dr. Benton.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S4 3
programme.desc: With Sean as the captain, the biggest of the big-time bidders head to Marina Del Rey in search of true nautical treasures. In one of the most explosive episodes to date, Scott and Brandon test each others jibs. Only one can swim - the other must sink!

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S6 1
programme.desc: Michael shocks a receptionist with a medical procedure that leaves both their jaws on the floor, and then at a party store, Michael reveals a regenerating piece of gum. Plus, an electrifying trick rewrites history.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S6 2
programme.desc: At a library, Michael shocks people with every trick in the book, including a voice-controlled page-turner and outfit changes that almost get him recognized! And later, Michael amazes a trainee with a weightless mattress!

programme.title: World's Dumbest S15 3
programme.desc: Pull back the curtain on 20 of the dumbest performers ever to take the stage - from an angry Elmo to a lion trainer who almost becomes dinner and a woman who crushes watermelons. They all get harsh reviews from celebrities like Danny Bonaduce and Leif Garrett, plus hot comics like Mike Trainor.

programme.title: ER S1 15
programme.desc: Morgenstern offers Greene a position as attending physician after completion of his residency. New crash carts are stolen by cardiology. Deb outshines Carter in front of Dr. Benton.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S2 5
programme.desc: The guys go barking up the wrong tree at a pet store, take a swing as golf instructors, and give their regards to Broadway as producers in need of funding.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 10
programme.desc: Michael shows some unsuspecting shoppers how to manipulate solid objects, and he reveals the truth behind how automatic vacuums work. Plus, one employee's shift at a camping store becomes very colorful - and confusing.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 11
programme.desc: At Michael's fireworks stand, he's got everything from exploding fruit to levitation sparklers. And at a Hemp store, Michael shows off his innovations in hemp technology. Plus, a time capsule completely blows one man's mind!

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 12
programme.desc: Michael tries new foods like shape-shifting pasta and never-ending soup! Then it's off to a vinyl shop for a record-breaking illusion, and later, Michael tries to convince his coworker to explore a new plant.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 13
programme.desc: At a wilderness store, Michael reels in customers with an amazing new fishing tool, and at an AT&T store, Michael shows off a camera that's literally paper thin. Plus, a day of mini golf turns explosive when a loose cannon appears.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 14
programme.desc: Michael uncovers the secrets behind baoding balls, origami and paper lamps, and at Eataly, he reveals a spray that turns everything into bacon. Plus, a picture worth a thousand words leaves Michael's assistant speechless.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 15
programme.desc: Michael trains his coworkers how to hold a dog who can't hold it, and at the AT&T store, Michael shows off a new way to lighten the load. Plus, a man can vanish into a manhole, but the whole hole can't vanish, right?!

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 16
programme.desc: At a cell phone store, Michael reveals an exciting new way to fix your tablet, and later, he makes a drink that's impossible to swallow. Plus, a dog owner loves that Michael has turned her pet into the smartest animal in the world.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 17
programme.desc: Michael turns leftovers into beauty products at a soap shop, and at a record store, he shows a hip-hop fan how to jump around. Plus, at a children's store, Michael's co-worker learns about the dangers of babysitting.

programme.title: Caught! (Season 2) S2 6

programme.title: Caught! (Season 2) S2 8
programme.desc: Officers in high-velocity situations need to make life-or-death decisions and put their lives in danger to protect and serve every day.

programme.title: Caught! (Season 2) S2 9
programme.desc: See these incredible brushes with disaster, close calls and near-death events avoided by split-second decisions that change the course of fate.

programme.title: Friends S8 4
programme.desc: Ross and Rachel's attempt to explain to everyone how they ended up in bed together.

programme.title: Friends S8 5
programme.desc: Ross is horrified to learn that Rachel is going on a date with a handsome actor.

programme.title: The Way Back
programme.desc: Oscar® winner Ben Affleck is Jack Cunningham, a former high school basketball phenom who faces his inner demons by agreeing to coach a mediocre high school basketball team.

programme.title: Collateral Damage
programme.desc: Firefighter Gordon Brewer, is done putting out fires and ready to start one of his own. When his wife and child are horrifically killed in an international terrorist bombing -- linked to Claudio "The Wolf" Perrini -- the CIA and FBI offer no answers and no response. With the official investigation going nowhere, and haunted by the thought of his family's killer walking away scot-free, Gordon swears revenge, even if it takes him to Colombia.

programme.title: The Legend of Tarzan (2016)
programme.desc: A new live-action adventure from director David Yates (Harry Potter films) brings Edgar Rice Burroughs' legendary character back to the big screen. It's been years since the man once known as Tarzan (Alexander Skarsgard --True Blood) left the jungles of Africa behind for a gentrified life as John Clayton III, Lord Greystoke, with his beloved wife, Jane (Margot Robbie --The Wolf of Wall Street) at his side. Now, he has been invited back to the Congo to serve as a trade emissary of Parliament, unaware that he is a pawn in a deadly convergence of greed and revenge, masterminded by the Belgian, Captain Leon Rom (Oscar® winner Christoph Waltz). But those behind the murderous plot have no idea what they are about to unleash.

programme.title: Friends S8 6
programme.desc: Phoebe meets the friendly fianc? of her flighty twin, Ursula.

programme.title: Friends S8 7
programme.desc: Ross is happy to learn that pregnant Rachel wants to find her own apartment.

programme.title: Justice League (2017)
programme.desc: Fueled by his restored faith in humanity and inspired by Superman's selfless act, Bruce Wayne enlists the help of his newfound ally, Diana Prince, to face an even greater enemy. Together, Batman and Wonder Woman work quickly to find and recruit a team of metahumans to stand against this newly awakened threat. But despite the formation of this unprecedented league of heroes – Batman, Wonder Woman, Aquaman, Cyborg and the Flash – it may already be too late to save the planet from an assault of catastrophic proportions.

programme.title: JokER (2019)
programme.desc: Joker centers around an origin of the iconic arch nemesis and is an original, standalone story not seen before on the big screen. Todd Phillips' exploration of Arthur Fleck (Joaquin Phoenix), a man disregarded by society is not only a gritty character study, but also a broader cautionary tale.

programme.title: Sight Unseen (Season 2)
programme.desc: During a routine interview at a chemical plant, Tess and Leo are trapped by a gunman looking to kill the plant’s manager. Tess and Leo's attempt to evacuate the target and other workers safely is cut short when Leo is shot and injured, leaving Tess and Sunny to outsmart the gunman, escape the lockdown, and save the day. With unexpected help from Matt and Mia, Sunny guides Tess around the highly flammable plant to save Leo's life and uncover the gunman’s motive before he blows them all up. Tess and Sunny are both blindsided by unsettling news as Lucas shares plans to get married, and Sunny finally uncovers Rigby’s secret.

programme.title: FBI (Season 7)
programme.desc: A park ranger is shot dead by a masked assailant on Governors Island.

programme.title: NCIS: Sydney (Season 2)
programme.desc: There’s big trouble in the Top End as NCIS: Sydney brave crocs, midges and ‘mango madness’ to investigate a US-Australian training exercise that turns deadly.

programme.title: S.W.A.T. (Season 6)
programme.desc: Hondo and the team are forced to partner with an old nemesis to track down a dangerous criminal.

programme.title: Cyril: Simply Magic
programme.desc: Join Cyril on a journey of self-discovery in various locations across Asia as he shares the marvels of his magic.

programme.title: Coroner (Season 3)
programme.desc: In the wake of COVID-19, Jenny investigates the mysterious death of a care worker whose body is found in her own car.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex (Season 5)
programme.desc: When an important trial is jeopardized after Sarah's testimony is challenged by a former rival in court, it's up to Charlie, Rex and the rest of the Major Crimes team to uncover new evidence.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (Season 14)
programme.desc: Frank intervenes when tensions rise between Mayor Chase (Dylan Walsh) and the fire commissioner of New York City (Mira Sorvino).

programme.title: Blue Bloods (Season 14)
programme.desc: Danny and Baez scrutinize an art gallery suspected of selling counterfeit pieces after a detective investigating the establishment is murdered.

programme.title: The Amazing Race (Season 35)
programme.desc: Teams continue racing in Slovenia, carefully traveling on foot-carrying wooden pieces on their back, descending deep into a cave and assembling a giant dragon and scraping off mussels and barnacles in the waters.

programme.title: The Amazing Race (Season 35)
programme.desc: Teams travel 1,000 miles from Slovenia to Sweden where they must face their fears and skydive from 10,000 feet over the Baltic sea, recreate a midsummer tradition and sort through recyclable items.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Superhumans defy a government plot to harness and abuse their powers. Chris Evans and Dakota Fanning (the TWILIGHT films) team up in a pulse-pounding paranormal thriller.

programme.title: Cyril: Simply Magic
programme.desc: Join Cyril on a journey of self-discovery in various locations across Asia as he shares the marvels of his magic.

programme.title: Boston Blue (Season 1)
programme.desc: Danny and Lena race to stop a string of violent crimes before the situation spirals out of control, while Sarah’s plans for a family outing take an unexpected turn. At the same time, Jonah and Sean chase a case with surprising twists, and Mae receives an invitation that could change everything.

programme.title: Sight Unseen (Season 2)
programme.desc: Tess and Sunny must break the façade of a tight-knit family when the city is shaken by what appears to be a rare mother-daughter murder suicide at a dance academy. With Jake on another case, Tess and Leo struggle for control as they track down an elusive prodigy killer, under the watch of overly enthusiastic new sub detective OWEN COOPER. Meanwhile Sunny finds evidence that a mysterious intruder is breaking into her home when she sleeps, and Matt and Mia discover they have unexpected chemistry

programme.title: Elsbeth (Season 3)
programme.desc: After a donor’s death shakes New York’s nonprofit arts scene, Elsbeth questions the motives of the victim’s friend, Gary, the founder of a prominent poetry journal. Also, Elsbeth runs into her old friend Marissa Gold.

programme.title: The Rookie (Season 8)
programme.desc: John Nolan, the oldest rookie in the LAPD, has used his life experience, determination and sense of humor to keep up with rookies 20 years his junior. Nearing the end of his training, Nolan now faces his biggest challenge as a police officer when he must come to terms with the choices he has made in pursuit of the truth.

programme.title: Doc (Season 2)
programme.desc: Chief resident race heats up as Amy and Sonya judge each other's cases; a politician's crisis threatens a vote, and Michael's parents stir drama.

programme.title: Karate Kid: Legends
programme.desc: A kung fu prodigy trains with two legends to face a new rival in an epic martial arts showdown.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior (Season 15)
programme.desc: The National Finals begin in Las Vegas as the remaining competitors move on to Stage 1 for their chance to win $1 million and become the next American Ninja Warrior.

programme.desc: After a donor’s death shakes New York’s nonprofit arts scene, Elsbeth questions the motives of the victim’s friend, Gary, the founder of a prominent poetry journal. Also, Elsbeth runs into her old friend Marissa Gold.

programme.desc: Based on true events, a young scientist who specialises in the study of aliens and extraterrestrials sets out to uncover the mystery behind a series of strange occurrences in Kerala.

programme.title: Jealousy
programme.desc: Model Min is admitted to a hospital, but mysteriously falls to her death at night. Rumour has it that the hospital is haunted. Subsequently, Min's photographer begins receiving eerie phone calls, the writer loses consciousness in a bizarre car accident, and her friend mysteriously disappears…

programme.title: Zhong Kui Exorcism
programme.desc: After hunting fox demons, Zhong Kui returns to Heyang Village only to discover that his lover and neighbours have been slaughtered. Following the trail to Lingdu City, he encounters Princess Liu Li, who has been cursed into a half-human, half-monster form. Armed with his demon-slaying sword, he battles the demons to save Liu Li and protect the city.

programme.title: 3AM
programme.desc: A group of friends goes on a camping trip inside a supposedly haunted forest despite warning not to do so. As night falls and camps are set, the complicated relationships of lust and love between them are exposed, triggering a series of paranormal events that punishes them. When dawn breaks, who will get out of the forest alive?

programme.title: Behave
programme.desc: Following the death of their friend, a group of young adults travels to a villa on the outskirts of London that contains a deep mystery. As unsettling events escalate during their luxurious stay, they must unravel the villa’s dark secrets.

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Artiste Yin Qing enters Hell's Gate through a supernatural TV show and reunites with her late friend Mei Qi. At Mei Qi's gravesite, Yin Qing encounters Mei Qi's husband, Dong Sheng, and a series of mysterious incidents unfold. She then brings Dong Sheng onto the show, where Mei Qi exposes his infidelity and reveals the conspiracy behind her death.

Following the trail to Lingdu City, he encounters Princess Liu Li, who has been cursed into a half-human, half-monster form. Armed with his demon-slaying sword, he battles the demons to save Liu Li and protect the city.

programme.title: Chapter 1 Mae Nak Reborn
programme.desc: Mae Nak the ghost wife returns to take revenge for a pregnant woman who is sexually assaulted and loses her baby. No one can identify the assailant except Mae Nak, who turns into an evil spirit in order to punish the assailant for his evil deeds.

programme.title: The Ice Cream Truck
programme.desc: Mary moves back to her suburban hometown as her husband is relocated there for work. While waiting for her husband in their new house, Mary becomes the target of an evil slasher that stalks the suburbs in an ice-cream truck. She soon learns that the suburbs are not what they seem...

programme.title: She is in Danger
programme.desc: After a fight with her boyfriend, Xue leaves home to stay in a remote B&B accommodation, together with a roommate Yi. One night, Xue accidentally discovers that Yi and another friend have killed Yi's ex-boyfriend, and is locked up by the duo so as to cover up the murder. Xue's buddy, Wen, comes seeking for her - can Xue and Wen escape from danger?

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Dead West
programme.desc: When Pam Shelly, 31, is found in her Cuero, Texas, bathroom with a fatal gunshot wound to the head, her death is initially ruled a suicide.

programme.title: Jean Perera: The Beauty Queen Murder
programme.desc: When former Malaysian beauty queen Jean Perera was found brutally stabbed in 1979, the subsequent murder trial would capture and divide public opinion.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Murder In The Bayou
programme.desc: The town of Alexandria, Louisiana, is rocked when the body of Courtney Coco, 19, is found dumped 200 miles from home in Winnie, Texas.

programme.title: Tell Me How I Died
programme.desc: When a young woman dies in a car crash, it's up to the Coroner's Office to trigger an investigation into an accident that may have involved foul play.

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2)
programme.desc: Nia Wilson and her two sisters decided to take public transportation back home. But just minutes after texting their father, the sisters were brutally targeted at a train station.

programme.title: Lie Detector: Truth Or Deception
programme.desc: Jesse Holton sits down for a high-stakes polygraph test with retired FBI examiner George Olivo. In 2016, Jesse became a suspect after a dispute with his parents ended in their brutal deaths.

programme.title: Lie Detector: Truth Or Deception
programme.desc: Eva Hamby sits down for a polygraph test with a former FBI agent in an effort to clear her name. Hamby was convicted of second-degree murder for the stabbing death of her boyfriend.

programme.title: Beyond The Headlines: The Series
programme.desc: Heartbreaking accounts of families torn apart by crime. Ashley Wallace, who was almost killed by her own mother, Jenny Carrieri, whose search for her sister's murderer consumed her life.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S1)
programme.desc: A suspect flees from a high-speed car chase while carrying her infant child. State troopers catch a man with a stolen utility pole strapped to the roof of his car.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S2)
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country: a Florida tourist decides to take a scenic car drive through the ocean; a fugitive fleeing from police hides in plain sight; and more!

programme.title: Cold Case Files: DNA Speaks
programme.desc: When Linda Slaten is brutally strangled in her Lakeland, FL, home, a web of suspects emerges. The case takes a dramatic turn when a DNA hit exposes the sinister underbelly of this peaceful community.

programme.title: Booked: First Day In (S2)
programme.desc: A young woman gets caught with a car she wasn't supposed to have, and a man charged with his first DWI hits an expected roadblock when he tries to bail out.

programme.title: Evil Up Close (S6)
programme.desc: Nanny Yoselyn Ortega had been looking after Kevin and Marina's three children. One day, plagued by psychotic thoughts and hearing voices, she snapped, with devastating consequences for two tiny lives.

programme.title: Court Cam: Top Five Courtroom Eruptions
programme.desc: A look at the top five moments of outrage on Court Cam.

programme.title: Court Cam: Top Five Outrageous Judges 3

programme.title: After The First 48 (S15)
programme.desc: When a transient man is gunned down, the only eyewitness Mobile detectives have is also a suspect. At trial, reluctant witnesses, defendants pointing fingers at each other.

programme.title: After The First 48 (S16)
programme.desc: In Tulsa, there's little evidence and no clear motive after a beloved 24-year-old is gunned down in the backseat of a car. It's up to his friends to help detectives and prosecutors deliver justice.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty Or Innocent? (S6)
programme.desc: Two Houston parents are shot dead as they sleep, and their teenage son stands accused of murder. The legal battle deepens as new evidence is discovered.

programme.title: The First 48 (S26)
programme.desc: In Tulsa, a late-night meeting spins out of control, leaving a young father dead, his friend critically injured, and their SUV crashed through a child's bedroom.

programme.title: Accused: Did I Do It?
programme.desc: A peaceful Sunday morning ends in tragedy when a car accident ends in a deadly altercation. A 25-year old man is charged with second-degree murder after he shoots a teenage driver dead.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln becomes indebted to Lola when he asks her for money to try and attain a rare David Steele collectible.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover
programme.desc: Chloe, Jinx, and Booch are designing a new school mascot, but Max and Phoebe's fighting ruins the project. After Chloe expresses her anger toward her siblings, they realize their twin-fighting impacts Chloe in new ways now that they're guardians.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover
programme.desc: After Phoebe and Max let Chloe's friends watch a horror movie and eat candy, Jinx and Booch's parents want to meet Chloe's. With Hank and Barb away, Max and Phoebe transform into them to help Chloe. It goes well until the real Hank and Barb show up.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: Whaaaat?!? Captain Man and Kid Danger are each stuck in a hole?!? Charlotte and Jasper better go help, 'cuz Schwoz is takin' a bean bath!

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: When Dr. Minyak takes the Man Fans hostage, Captain Man and Kid Danger have to find a way to rescue them without Dr. Minyak seeing them move.

programme.title: Danger Force
programme.desc: Captain Man makes twin superheroes, ShoutOut and AWOL, compete over who can catch more criminals using their own ways of crime-fighting.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Carly, Sam, and Freddie urge the iCarly fans to vote David Archuleta to victory on America Sings, they feel bad for the runner-up and help him make a music video. Meanwhile, Sam teaches Spencer how to lie like a pro.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Sam admits she has a crush on a boy at school, Carly teaches Sam how to entice him by acting more girly. Meanwhile, Spencer is convinced that a girl likes him because of his tuxedo, so he starts wearing it all the time.

programme.title: Victorious
programme.desc: Tori accidentally gets Beck fired from a small role in a movie, then must figure out a way to get him his job back. Meanwhile, Robbie suffers frightening nightmares about his best friend Rex.

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: Nora makes a return and targets Dice as a way to get revenge on Sam. With nowhere else to turn, Sam and Cat are forced to ask for some unlikely help from Nevel.

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Raph's brothers just don't get him. He NEEDS to fight! He's good at it too, according to his new trainer Spuds. But even though they don't see eye to eye, the Turtles must work together to stop a rampaging Bebop and Rocksteady from wrecking the city!

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: All of Raph's dreams have come true as he fights Rocksteady, Bebop, and Mondo Gecko in the underground Mutant Battle Arena. But he doesn't realize he's walked right into a trap set by Kitsune and her street gang, the Purple Dragons!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants

programme.title: Sari Saring Sine: Campus Girls
programme.desc: Vangie, Georgie, Samantha and Diane are best of friends who encounter different journeys in life as they go through college. Their friendship gets tested when Diane and Georgie fight over the affections of college heartthrob Louie, while Samantha discovers that Vangie is her dad's young mistress.

programme.title: Cuerpo Y Alma ep 10
programme.desc: Maya, a young nurse who has been having terrifying nightmares finds out a horrifying truth about a debt that was made to save her life when she was a child. As she's about to find out, the payment just may cost her much more than her life.

programme.title: Taddy Taddy Po ep 3
programme.desc: A Sari-Sari Original Series. In this modern family, love wins. Alex is an up-and-coming reporter in a relationship with Marcus, a chef. One day, Alex's sister's kids show up at the couple's doorstep and the couple has no choice but to take care of the kids.

programme.title: Puto ep 2
programme.desc: A modern sequel from the classic 80's movie of the same title with Herbert Bautista reprising his role as Puto, now with his son Uno.

programme.title: Di na Muli ep 13

programme.title: Ghost Adventures S1 ep 12
programme.desc: A clairvoyant repairman fearful of ghosts is forced to help them cross over so they can leave him in peace. On his journey of helping these ghosts with their unfinished businesses, he ends up getting into trouble with their families, friends and the community they are all living in. Will he be able to get these ghosts and their love ones, at the same time face his fear of them?

programme.title: The Last Woman Standing ep 7
programme.desc: After the death of his wife, a man's four mistresses compete against one another to become his next wife, as his wife's ghost continues to haunt them.

programme.title: Team A S1 ep 13
programme.desc: Janet and Ian started a simple life together, but will their maried life be as happy as they dreamed to be when both their parents treat each other as enemy?
